text: My app keeps crashing every time I try to open it. I've reinstalled it three times but the problem persists. Running on iPhone 14 with iOS 17.
I was charged twice for my monthly subscription this billing cycle. Please refund the duplicate payment immediately.
How do I export my data to a CSV file? I can't find the option in settings.
I forgot my password and the reset email never arrives in my inbox. I've checked spam too.
The dashboard is extremely slow to load. Takes over 30 seconds every time. My internet is fine.
I need to add 5 more seats to our enterprise plan for new team members joining next week.
The API keeps returning 500 errors when I try to create new records. My authentication token is valid.
Can you integrate with Slack? We'd love to get notifications there instead of email.
My account got locked after too many login attempts. I need it unlocked urgently for a client meeting.
The dark mode feature is great but text is barely readable in some menus. White text on light grey background.
We need GDPR data deletion for a former employee. Please delete all their records within 72 hours.
Notifications stopped working after the latest update. I'm not getting alerts for new messages.
I'd like to downgrade from Pro to Basic plan at the end of my billing cycle. How do I do that?
Your documentation on webhooks is outdated. The endpoints listed no longer exist.
Files over 10MB won't upload. I get a generic error with no explanation. Need to upload 50MB reports.
Can you add multi-language support? Our team is in Spain and Germany and they prefer native languages.
I accidentally deleted an important project. Is there any way to recover it or see a backup?
The two-factor authentication SMS never arrives. I've verified my phone number is correct.
Search results are completely wrong. Searching for 'project alpha' shows completely unrelated results.
We're a non-profit. Do you offer any special pricing or discounts for organizations like ours?
